title: latam-oiv-resolver: Multi-country Latin American Critical Infrastructure Operator Registry Resolver
description: Multi-country canonical resolver for critical infrastructure operators (CI/OIV equivalents) across Latin American regulatory frameworks. Unified JSON Schema and TypeScript API supporting Chile (Ley 21.663) · Argentina (Decreto 92/2026) · Brasil (PNSC) · Colombia (CONPES 3854) · México (ENC + IFT/CNBV) · Uruguay (AGESIC) with 323 operators indexed across 5 implemented countries (AR · BR · CO · MX · UY) and 5 in pilot (PE · EC · CR · PA · DO). Apache 2.0 license · npm published · companion tool to forthcoming LATAM Atlas paper.

creators.name: Mellafe Zuvic, David
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher · operating Reizan via AlmaAI SpA (RUT 78.387.715-5)

notes: Multi-country resolver companion to forthcoming LATAM Atlas paper · canonical at https://reizan.io/papers · operated by AlmaAI SpA · RUT 78.387.715-5
